message:
refactor(db): chunk IN-clause queries, generalize S3FIFO lookups, and rename BPS to PCT

The queries module previously capped large IN-clause lists by silently
truncating to MAX_IN_CLAUSE_ITEMS, which meant results beyond the cap
were quietly dropped. This changes get_agents_by_ids,
get_messages_details_by_ids, list_message_recipient_names_for_messages,
get_reservations_by_ids, and release_reservations_by_ids to iterate
over chunks so all IDs are processed correctly.

The S3FIFO cache methods (get, get_mut, contains_key, remove) now accept
generic borrowed key types via Borrow<Q>, allowing callers to look up
String-keyed caches with &str directly. This eliminates unnecessary
to_owned() allocations in the read-cache hot path for project lookups
by slug and human_key.

The search_service hybrid budget governor renames "scale_bps" fields and
env vars to "scale_pct" since the values were always treated as
percentages (1-100), not basis points. This corrects the naming to
match the actual semantics and avoids confusion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
